name: Splunk Observability Platform Integration MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for Splunk Platform and Splunk Observability Cloud integration readiness.
author: splunk-observability-cloud-integration-setup skill

tools.name: o11y_platform_app_health
tools.title: Observability Integration App Health
tools.description: Check Splunk-side Observability Cloud and Infrastructure Monitoring app state.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=splunk_app_infrastructure OR title=Splunk_TA_Infrastructure OR title=Splunk_TA_sim OR title=splunk_app_for_splunk_observability_cloud OR title=Splunk Observability Cloud | table title label version disabled visible configured state | sort title

tools.name: o11y_platform_token_auth_visibility
tools.title: Observability Token Auth Visibility
tools.description: Show visible auth and account stanzas for Splunk-side Observability integrations without exposing secret values.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/configs/conf-passwords count=0 | search eai:acl.app=Splunk_TA_sim OR eai:acl.app=splunk_app_infrastructure OR title=*splunk*observability* | eval credential_present=if(isnotnull(clear_password),"true","false") | table title eai:acl.app realm username credential_present | sort title

tools.name: o11y_platform_token_auth_state
tools.title: Observability Token Auth State
tools.description: Read Splunk Platform token-auth enablement state needed by Observability Cloud pairing.
tools.spl: | rest /services/admin/token-auth/tokens_auth count=0 | table title disabled eai:acl.app

tools.name: o11y_platform_discover_app_state
tools.title: Discover Observability App State
tools.description: Read Discover Splunk Observability Cloud configuration tab state visible through local Splunk REST handlers.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/discover_splunk_observability_cloud/related_content_discovery count=0 | eval surface="related_content_discovery" | table surface title enabled disabled eai:acl.app | append [| rest /servicesNS/nobody/discover_splunk_observability_cloud/field_aliasing count=0 | eval surface="field_aliasing" | table surface title auto_field_mapping enabled disabled eai:acl.app] | append [| rest /servicesNS/nobody/discover_splunk_observability_cloud/automatic_ui_updates count=0 | eval surface="automatic_ui_updates" | table surface title enabled disabled eai:acl.app] | append [| rest /servicesNS/nobody/discover_splunk_observability_cloud/access_tokens count=0 | eval surface="access_tokens", token_configured=if(isnotnull(access_token),"true","false") | table surface title realm token_configured disabled eai:acl.app] | sort surface title

tools.name: o11y_platform_loc_readiness
tools.title: Log Observer Connect Readiness
tools.description: Check Splunk-side Log Observer Connect saved searches, macros, and app state visible through REST.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/saved/searches count=0 | search title=*Log*Observer* OR title=*Observability* OR eai:acl.app=splunk_app_for_splunk_observability_cloud | table title eai:acl.app disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule | sort title

tools.name: o11y_platform_sim_inputs
tools.title: SIM Add-on Account And Input Health
tools.description: List Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring add-on inputs and account-like configurations.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app=Splunk_TA_sim OR title=*signalfx* OR title=*sim* | table title eai:acl.app disabled index sourcetype interval | sort title

tools.name: o11y_platform_sim_accounts
tools.title: SIM Add-on Account Health
tools.description: List Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring add-on accounts without exposing token values.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/Splunk_TA_sim/splunk_infrastructure_monitoring_account count=0 | eval token_configured=if(isnotnull(access_token),"true","false") | table title name realm disabled job_start_rate event_search_rate token_configured | sort title

tools.name: o11y_platform_sim_metrics_data
tools.title: SIM Metrics Data
tools.description: Show recent metric names visible in the sim_metrics index.
tools.spl: | mcatalog values(metric_name) as metric_name where index=sim_metrics by metric_name | sort metric_name
